---
pagetitle: "Publications · Sushovan Majhi"
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  - id: preprints
    template: ../../ejs/preprints.ejs
    contents: preprints.yml
    categories: true
  - id: journals
    template: ../../ejs/journals.ejs
    contents: journals.yml
  - id: conferences
    template: ../../ejs/conferences.ejs
    contents: conferences.yml
  - id: thesis
    contents:
      - categories: [TDA,Applied Topology,Pattern Matching,Computational Geometry]
    template:  ../../ejs/thesis.ejs
---

```{=html}
<header class="masthead page publications-opening">
  <div class="kicker">Sushovan Majhi</div>
  <div class="pub-title">Publications</div>
  <div class="edition">
    <span>Eleven preprints &middot; ten journal papers</span>
    <span>Seven conference proceedings &middot; one thesis</span>
    <span>Updated MMXXVI</span>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="lede publications-opening">
  <p>Twenty-nine items between the preprint server and the published record. Eleven preprints are still in review or recently accepted; ten papers have appeared in journals; seven in conference proceedings; one is the doctoral thesis. They divide, in retrospect, into two streams: theorems about when a finite sample remembers the shape it was drawn from, and applied collaborations that have carried those theorems into finance, climate, fluid mechanics, and biology.</p>
  <p>The list below is mechanically sorted (most recent first within each section) and is the authoritative version. The right-hand margin offers a category filter. If anything is missing or out of date, it will be corrected by post: <a href="mailto:s.majhi@gwu.edu">s.majhi@gwu.edu</a>.</p>
</div>
```

## Preprints

```{=html}
<div class="section-byline">
  <span>Filed under <em>Preprints</em></span>
  <span>Eleven, MMXXII&ndash;MMXXVI</span>
</div>
<p class="section-kicker">Submitted; not yet defended in print.</p>
```

::: {#preprints}
:::

## Refereed Journal Publications

```{=html}
<div class="section-byline">
  <span>Filed under <em>Journals</em></span>
  <span>Ten papers, MMXXII&ndash;MMXXV</span>
</div>
<p class="section-kicker">Ten papers, many referees, fourteen years.</p>
```

::: {#journals}
:::

## Refereed Conference Proceedings &amp; Workshops

```{=html}
<div class="section-byline">
  <span>Filed under <em>Proceedings</em></span>
  <span>Seven, MMXXIII&ndash;MMXXVI</span>
</div>
<p class="section-kicker">Where the discipline meets quickly.</p>
```

::: {#conferences}
:::

## Doctoral Thesis

```{=html}
<div class="section-byline">
  <span>Filed under <em>Thesis</em></span>
  <span>Tulane &middot; MMXX</span>
</div>
<p class="section-kicker">The first long argument.</p>
```

::: {#thesis}
:::

```{=html}
<aside class="colophon" style="margin-top: 3rem;">
  <span class="monogram">&#10086;</span>
  <p>The same record, in paper form, is the <a href="../../assets/cv.pdf">CV</a>. For citation counts and a slightly noisier mirror, see <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=3zP2QQsAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a>. Back to the <a href="../">research overview</a>.</p>
</aside>
```
